    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ArraySortedAssert<SELF extends ArraySortedAssert<SELF,ELEMENT>,ELEMENT>
    Assertions applicable to primitive arrays or arrays of elements either naturally Comparable or according to a given Comparator.
